trivia_bullets.text: Core Set 2021 (M21) released July 3, 2020, contains 274 cards, and features a deliberate Dogs vs. Cats subtheme: cats in green/white, dogs in white/red, anchored by Rin and Seri, Inseparable. The set also officially renamed the Hound creature type to Dog via errata.
4/2 uncommon Cat with 'must be blocked if able' plus a death trigger granting 1 life per creature that died that turn — a limited combat trap with minimal Commander presence. EDHREC rank 23,064.
"The forest's cover offers shade, shelter, and an increased risk of sudden death." — no speaker attributed. Mirrors the card's mechanical identity as a combat-forcing predator.
Art by Ilse Gort, Dutch freelance illustrator with 63+ MTG cards. She sells prints of Canopy Stalker through her INPRNT gallery under handle 'caraid' — one of the artist's self-promoted pieces.
sources: INPRNT: Canopy Stalker by Ilse Gort (via WebSearch snippet)
Gatherer: Artist Ilse Gort (via WebSearch snippet)
